name: What if employer uninsured after my job ladder fall?

mainEntity.name: What if employer uninsured after my job ladder fall?

acceptedAnswer.description:
**File with state uninsured fund**—Utah/Idaho guarantee benefits via contingency funds.[1][6]

Covers medical/wages like insured claims.

- Prove employment, injury.
- Sue employer personally too.

Funds cap lower—act quick.
